summary: Create shared _constants.py module for tool classification, condition sets, and thresholds — eliminates 3-way DRY violations and fixes MCP tool name mismatch
context: Code review found tool categories defined 3x with conflicting classification, PRODUCTIVE_TOOLS defined 3x with different members, and MCP-prefixed tool names never matching bare name sets in behavior_outcome.py and effect_decomposition.py (rendering those analyzers useless).
rationale: Single source of truth for all tool/condition/threshold constants. normalize_tool_name() strips MCP prefixes enabling correct matching. All dimension modules now import from _constants instead of defining locally.

alternatives.option: Fix each module individually without shared module
alternatives.reason_rejected: Would maintain 3 copies of tool classifications that could drift again. Shared module is the standard DRY solution.
